user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, verify the Loop Dashboard renders the global Supervisor control plane from real Supervisor artifacts without treating it as a task run.
prerequisites: The evaluator can start an isolated Loop Dashboard backend against a temporary fixture repository.
The fixture includes .codex/supervisor artifacts and ordinary .codex/loop-runs records.
steps: Seed valid Supervisor state and service health artifacts.
Seed one service with missing runtime metadata and one service with stale or mismatched runtime metadata.
Seed a stopped_budget autonomous run, a continuation candidate, and a duplicate-suppressed idempotent continuation plan.
Seed recovery attempts at 0/3, 1/3, and 3/3 plus an open user decision.
Seed Auditor control inputs for continue, must_fix, and stop while keeping Auditor quality judgment text distinct from Supervisor control actions.
Open the dashboard in Chromium and inspect the global Supervisor panel.
Delete Supervisor artifacts and reload the dashboard to verify degraded empty states.
expected_outcomes: 全局 Supervisor 面板 is visible and says Supervisor is independent from the task list.
The task run list does not include loop-supervisor or supervisor.
服务行显示正常、版本不可用、版本过期 or mismatched version states with concrete evidence.
The stopped_budget run is visible as an ordinary run, but no synthetic Supervisor run appears in .codex/loop-runs.
The continuation candidate and 幂等键只出现一次 even when a duplicate continuation request was suppressed.
The recovery ceiling shows 0/3, 1/3, 3/3 and 需要用户决策.
Auditor 区分控制输入和质量判断: the UI states Supervisor consumes Auditor conclusions but does not judge task quality.
After deleting Supervisor artifacts, the UI displays 暂无数据/不可用 instead of a green success state.
failure_signals: The evaluator does not accept --scenario loop-supervisor-01.
The browser can only pass when fake green defaults are shown.
A synthetic loop-supervisor run is created under .codex/loop-runs.
The duplicate idempotency key appears multiple times in visible UI.
Auditor verdicts are rendered as if Supervisor produced quality judgments.
cleanup: Temporary fixture repository and isolated dashboard process are removed by the evaluator.
